_provenance: Schema-derived from AC-P2.4.2 per-field aggregation spec. Value-weightable fields (current_return, last_percent_change, last_dollar_change, value, cash) use allocation-weighted sum on common-denominator quantities. Net_deposits is arithmetically summed (flow quantity). Path-dependent fields (max_drawdown, simple_return, time_weighted_return) are NOT in this fixture — they require port-equity series and are covered in 03_path_dependent_fields.json.
description: Two symphonies with known allocation weights. Asserts value-weightable fields aggregate correctly and net_deposits sums arithmetically.

derivations.last_dollar_change: 500.0 + 250.0 = 750.0 (dollar quantity sums; equivalent to value-weighted pct * total_value)
derivations.sharpe_ratio: Unavailable — cannot value-weight across symphonies with different return series histories (AC-P2.4.2 Unavailable/dropped). Returns null.
derivations.annualized_rate_of_return: Unavailable — cannot value-weight chain-linked rates with different history lengths (AC-P2.4.2 Unavailable/dropped). Returns null.
